title: Can we add the ‘Team’ (and others columns) to the users view / export?
excerpt: Hi, we have multiple Admins in our instance and are having a difficult time managing licenses across all groups since monday doesn’t allow blocking of adding new users if we reach capacity. In the Admin>Users View, the e…

posts.author: emilytriyonis (Emily Triyonis)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, we have multiple Admins in our instance and are having a difficult time managing licenses across all groups since monday doesn’t allow blocking of adding new users if we reach capacity. In the Admin>Users View, the export doesn’t include helpful information and Teams, Groups, etc needs to be added each time. Is there a way to go around this?
